entity.label: Shepham
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: A treeless place, Num. 34:10, 11: “The coast shall go down from Shepham to Riblah.”

nodes.label: Shepham
nodes.description: A treeless place, Num. 34:10, 11: “The coast shall go down from Shepham to Riblah.”

verses.text: And ye shall point out your east border from Hazarenan to Shepham:
And the coast shall go down from Shepham to Riblah, on the east side of Ain; and the border shall descend, and shall reach unto the side of the sea of Chinnereth eastward:
